channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Proctor, Knueppel carry No. 1 Duke past No. 13 Louisville 73-62 for 2nd ACC title in 3 years
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Tyrese Proctor entered Saturday night's ACC championship 0 for 10 from beyond the 3-point arc in his previous two tournament games. That didn't keep him from letting it fly. Proctor made six 3-pointers and scored 19 points, tournament MVP Kon Knueppel added 18 points and No.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Not again: Archbishop Mitty girls lose fourth consecutive Open Division state final
item.description: Archbishop Mitty girls basketball, without McKenna Woliczko, lost its fourth straight CIF Open Division girls basketball championship game on Saturday at Golden 1 Center in Sacramento.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Dick Vitale tears up on ACC Championship broadcast while talking about recent cancer battle
item.description: Dick Vitale became emotional Saturday night while talking about his most recent cancer battle while announcing top-ranked Duke’s 73-62 victory over No. 13 Louisville in the Atlantic Coast Conference Tournament championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rose BC's Angel Reese named Unrivaled's 2025 Defensive Player of the Year
item.description: Unrivaled announced Saturday that Rose BC forward Angel Reese of the WNBA's Chicago Sky was named the 2025 Defensive Player of the Year.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Vikings acquire RB Jordan Mason from 49ers and give him a new 2-year deal, AP source says
item.description: The Minnesota Vikings acquired restricted free agent running back Jordan Mason from the San Francisco 49ers and rewarded him with a two-year deal worth up to $12 million.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: St. John's rallies to win Big East Tournament title, earns NCAA bid
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — RJ Luis Jr. scored all but two of his 29 points after halftime and No. 6 St. John's made 14 straight shots from the field in the second half to beat Creighton 82-66 on Saturday night for its first Big East Tournament title in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 49ers trade top rusher Mason to Vikings in exchange for draft assets
item.description: Jordan Mason took over the 49ers' starting running back role when Christian McCaffrey was out injured.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Tonje scores 32 as No. 18 Wisconsin tops No. 7 Michigan St. 77-74 in Big Ten semis
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — John Tonje scored 32 points and grabbed seven rebounds to help No. 18 Wisconsin beat No. 7 Michigan State 77-74 on Saturday in the semifinals of the Big Ten Tournament. John Blackwell added 14 points as the Badgers (26-8) won for the third time in four days. They will play No.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Draper knocks off 2-time defending champion Alcaraz to reach Indian Wells final
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — Jack Draper toppled two-time defending champion Carlos Alcaraz 6-1, 0-6, 6-4 on Saturday to reach the BNP Paribas Open final. The 13th-seeded Draper will face 12th-seeded Holger Rune on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No. 6 St. John's beats Creighton 82-66 for 1st Big East Tournament crown in 25 years
item.description: RJ Luis Jr. scored all but two of his 29 points after halftime and No. 6 St. John’s made 14 straight shots from the field in the second half to beat Creighton 82-66 for its first Big East Tournament title in 25 years.
item.dc:creator: Mike Fitzpatrick, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores 887th goal to move within 8 of breaking Wayne Gretzky's record
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Alex Ovechkin shook off a rough start to this three-game California swing by scoring his 887th career goal Saturday against the San Jose Sharks to move within eight of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Bill Belichick's 24-year-old girlfriend leaks message criticizing her relationship
item.description: Jordon Hudson, Bill Belichick's 24-year-old girlfriend, posted a screenshot of a hostile exchange between her and someone who criticized the couple's relationship.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NCAA's Gavitt: Duke, ACC tell selection committee Flagg will be available for March Madness
item.description: Top-ranked Duke and the Atlantic Coast Conference have informed the NCAA Tournament selection committee that freshman Cooper Flagg will be available for March Madness, NCAA senior vice president for basketball Dan Gavitt said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: BYU gets shut down by #2 Houston, 74-54
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the Big 12 Tournament quarterfinals, BYU scored 49 points in the first half against Iowa State. But in the semifinals against #2 Houston, BYU didn't eclipse the 49-point mark until there were three minutes left in the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Rams star Cooper Kupp to join division rival Seahawks after release: reports
item.description: Wide receiver Cooper Kupp has reportedly signed with the Seattle Seahawks after being released from the division rival Los Angeles Rams earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aggies shut down UNLV in Mountain West quarterfinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team lost to UNLV in its first trip to Las Vegas this season, but the Aggies didn't let that happen again.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Right to Play Act aims to lift IHSA restrictions on high school athletes in club sports
item.description: Illinois State Rep. Janet Yang-Rohr has introduced House Bill 3037, the "Right to Play Act," which would eliminate the IHSA rules that restrict student-athletes from playing their sport during the high school season, potentially improving opportunities for college scholarships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Third MLB hat pulled over accidental vulgarity as others sell for hundreds online
item.description: Yet another newly released MLB hat has been pulled from online stores after fans noted the potentially crass design the cap sported.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, WGN 9

item.title: Cougars make 18 three-pointers in 96-92 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points, hitting a crucial 3-pointer with less than a minute to go, and No. 17 BYU overcame a big game from Curtis Jones in a 96-90 victory over No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: George, Filipowski score 25 in Jazz loss to Sixers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George and Kyle Filipowski each scored 25 points, but the Utah Jazz dropped its fifth straight game, losing at Philadelphia Sunday night, 126-122. Lonnie Walker IV and Quentin Grimes scored 25 points apiece for the victories 76ers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bowling Green hires former NFL star running back Eddie George as coach
item.description: Bowling Green hired former NFL running back and Tennessee State coach Eddie George on Sunday as the Falcons' head coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges against Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy
item.description: Xavier Worthy was arrested Friday and has since been released after the county's district attorney said he would not accept the case at this time.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors star Stephen Curry reaches 25,000 career points
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry became the 26th player in NBA history to score 25,000 career points, reaching the milestone during the third quarter of the Golden State Warriors' 115-110 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Valley clinches WAC regular season title
item.description: STEPHENVILLE, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Dominick Nelson matched a career high with 25 points, and Carter Welling added 18 as Utah Valley defeated Tarleton State 71-66 in a sold-out Wisdom Gym on Saturday night, closing out WAC play with a statement win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
